creator: matthias@petermann-it.de
text:
Hi Mikael,

I was asked in the approval of this amendment. Since I am not involved in FreeBSD, at least at the moment, I cannot make a qualitative statement here. Formally I agree with the update, technically I would like to ask someone else who is closer to the issue. If you want, you are also welcome to sign up as maintainer for the package, if you are willing to maintain it for a longer period of time.

Thank you for your initiative and best regards
Matthias
